reviews.comment:
Sept.25: Before we went to Customs we gassed up the car, as in Chile the gasoline is more expensive.

We could pay with credit card with no extra fees.

Small and they don't accept cards
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGbFJXaEVkMG90Y2t4TFJrUk1hbE5NUmxoRFJVRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) This border crossing is beautiful, the place is wonderful, it has hotels, restaurants, a nice gas station, and attentive staff.
The wind there is strong and during the day it's reasonably hot, but in the afternoon it's cold 🥶❄️ after the border it's just ice and snow ⛄ only by mercy KKK
You need to be well prepared.
Sometimes they close because of snow on the road 🛣️ it blocks it.
Then you have to wait, which was our case, right?
But the view of the mountains and the place is spectacular.

(Original)
Essa fronteira é linda, local é maravilhoso, tem hotéis, restaurantes, posto bacana, funcionários atenciosos.
O vento lá é forte e de dia faz um calor razoável, mas de tarde é frio 🥶❄️ depois da fronteira é só gelo e neve ⛄ só pela misericórdia KKK
Precisa estar bem preparado.
As vezes eles fecham por causa da neve na estrada 🛣️ bloqueia.
Aí precisa esperar, que foi nosso caso né.
Mas a visão das montanhas e do local é espetacular.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOV1RXVndWSFF6YTI4eVIxOXhWR0ZJWXpOeFJIYxAB

reviews.comment:
No esta abierto las 24 hs. es falso. Si llegan después del horario de cierre de la frontera todo esta cerrado, atienden a las 9hs del otro día.

(Translated by Google)
It's not open 24 hours. That's false. If you arrive after the border closing time, everything is closed; they start serving customers at 9:00 AM the next day.
